hero.title: Streamline Your HR Operations
hero.subtitle: PeopleCore is the all-in-one HR platform that empowers companies to manage their workforce, payroll, attendance, and performance — all in one place.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run HR
features.subtitle: A complete suite of HR tools designed for modern teams

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.desc: Manage employee profiles, contracts, documents and org charts with ease.

payroll.title: Payroll Processing
payroll.desc: Automate payroll calculations, tax deductions and salary disbursements.

attendance.title: Attendance & Leave
attendance.desc: Track attendance, manage leave requests and monitor absences in real-time.

performance.title: Performance Reviews
performance.desc: Set goals, conduct reviews and track employee performance metrics.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.desc: Post jobs, manage applicants and streamline your hiring process.

reports.title: Analytics & Reports
reports.desc: Get deep insights with customizable dashboards and detailed reports.

whyUs.title: Why Choose PeopleCore?
whyUs.subtitle: Built for businesses of all sizes

multiTenant.title: Multi-Company Support
multiTenant.desc: Manage multiple companies from a single super admin panel.

secure.title: Enterprise Security
secure.desc: Bank-grade encryption and role-based access control.

multilang.title: Arabic & English
multilang.desc: Full RTL support for Arabic and LTR for English, seamlessly.

cloud.title: Cloud-Based
cloud.desc: Access your HR data from anywhere, on any device.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our team is here to help.
contact.name: Full Name

footer.tagline: The modern HR platform for forward-thinking companies.

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.

about.title: About PeopleCore
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to simplify HR for every company
about.storyText: PeopleCore was founded in 2020 by a team of HR professionals and engineers who understood the pain of outdated, complex HR systems. We built the platform we always wished existed — simple, powerful, and designed for real people.
about.missionText: To empower HR teams with intuitive tools that save time, reduce errors, and let them focus on what matters most: their people.
